text: I feel a sense of curiosity as I transition from the stark, functional hallway into this vibrant research and development exhibit. Surrounded by dynamic visuals and thoughtful words, I am aware of the intellectual energy in this space. It invites reflection on human progress—a reminder that behind all innovation there is a longing to understand, connect, and experiment. I feel both inspired and slightly disoriented, the tilted perspectives mirroring my own shifting thoughts.
